candidates.why: Component of shipping revenues; however, a consolidated 'Total Revenue' line exists and should be primary for top-line.
Potential revenue component but appears with no recent values; still a possible historical component of total revenue.
Major recurring revenue component; large values consistent with core operating revenue.
Generic revenue label but appears empty in recent columns; could be older-period revenue classification.
Explicit aggregate of all revenue streams and clearly labeled as total revenue; best single proxy for REVT.
Represents unearned revenue (liability), not recognized revenue; not suitable as REVT.

candidates.row_label: Deferred gains on sales of vessels
candidates.why: Deferred gain on asset sales, not operating revenue.

variables.notes: Use 'Total Revenue' as the primary REVT; other revenue components are listed as fallbacks in case of label changes over time.
No suitable COGS or cost of sales line is included in the provided candidate list, even though operating cost lines exist on the income statement. Per instructions, final_choice is left empty.

candidates.why: Represents other operating gains/losses, not SG&A overhead expenses; should not be used as SG&A.
Direct operating costs of vessels, analogous to COGS for a shipping company, not overhead SG&A.
Clearly labeled overhead expenses (administrative), matching SG&A-type costs; best available SG&A component.
Balance sheet accrual of operating expenses, not the primary P&L SG&A line; also more COGS-like.
Represents accrued admin expenses, but P&L 'Administrative expenses' is the primary SG&A measure.

variables.notes: Only the income-statement 'Administrative expenses' line is used as SG&A; ship operating expenses are treated as COGS-like and excluded.
No explicit research and development line is present in the candidate list; XRD is treated as missing (0) per instructions.

candidates.row_label: Share of results from associated company and gain on equity interest
candidates.why: Equity method results and gains, not interest expense.
Primary recurring interest expense line on the income statement; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of finance lease liabilities; a specific form of interest expense that may appear when main interest line is missing or reclassified.

candidates.row_label: Net income attributable to non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Represents profit attributable to NCI, not interest expense.
Comprehensive income component for NCI, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income for NCI, not interest.
Portion of earnings attributable to NCI, not interest.
Supplemental interest expense label; may be used in some periods; valid alternate interest line.
Capitalized interest, not period expense; generally excluded from interest expense for PROF, but listed as a candidate.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; valid alternate interest expense source.
Accrued interest expense component in current liabilities; can serve as a fallback if P&L interest lines are unavailable.
Equity for NCI, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interest; equity, not interest.
Imputed interest component of capital leases; can be treated as an interest adjustment if needed.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority is given to the main income statement interest expense line, followed by specific lease-interest and supplemental interest lines; balance sheet interest-related items are included as lower-priority fallbacks.

candidates.row_label: Share of results from associated company and gain on equity interest
candidates.why: Income statement item, not an equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the Company
candidates.why: Represents shareholders’ equity attributable to the parent company; a standard definition of book equity.
Represents total equity including non-controlling interest; also an acceptable measure of book equity/total equity.
Balance sheet total; includes liabilities, not pure equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the Company

variables.notes: Use 'Total equity' as primary BE (captures full equity including NCI), with 'Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the Company' as an alternative label if needed.

candidates.row_label: Net income attributable to non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Flow measure of earnings to NCI, not the balance of minority interest, but related conceptually.
Comprehensive income/loss to NCI; again a flow, not stock, of minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income to NCI; not a balance sheet minority interest amount.
Appears to be part of EPS attribution; again a flow, not stock minority interest.
Balance sheet line representing equity attributable to non-controlling interests; core definition of minority interest.
Alternative label for non-controlling interest; appears to be the same balance; excellent backup label.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet minority interest lines (stock measure) rather than income statement attribution lines (flow). 'Minority Interest' is listed first, with 'Non-controlling interest' as a direct alternative.
